description: Harness-neutral discovery catalog for Smart Classroom RAG workflow skills. Paths are relative to the repository root (education-ai-suite/).

skills.name: sc-setup
skills.description: Set up Flutter integration with the existing Content Search backend by checking Flutter availability, installing Flutter dependencies, creating backend venv, installing backend requirements, and running utils/flutter/setup.ps1.

skills.name: sc-up
skills.description: Bring up the Flutter implementation with the existing Content Search backend by running utils/flutter/start.ps1 and validating service health.

skills.name: sc-doctor
skills.description: Check Content Search backend health by probing the health endpoint and diagnosing Flutter-to-backend connectivity issues.

skills.name: sc-upload
skills.description: Upload a file to the Content Search backend and poll the ingestion task until indexed (COMPLETED). Handles duplicate detection, cleanup, and retry. Works with PDFs, videos, images, and Office documents.
requires: healthy Content Search backend (run sc-doctor first)
a supported file: pdf, txt, docx, pptx, xlsx, jpg, jpeg, png, mp4, avi, mov, mkv

skills.name: sc-qa
skills.description: Ask a natural-language question against indexed content via the RAG Q&A endpoint. Supports multi-turn conversation history, tag filtering, and returns cited sources.
requires: at least one COMPLETED ingestion (run sc-upload first)

skills.name: sc-files
skills.description: List, inspect, filter, and delete files that have been indexed in the Content Search backend. Also lists available tags.
